label: Value of a Prevented Fatality and casualty costs

vpf.label: Value of a Prevented Fatality
vpf.includes: Human costs (pain, grief, suffering) + direct economic costs (lost output, medical, police, insurance admin)

serious_injury.label: Average cost per serious casualty prevented

slight_injury.label: Average cost per slight casualty prevented

source.publication: TAG Data Book v2.02, Table A4.1.1

methodology: Willingness-to-pay from stated preference surveys, plus direct economic cost components.
caveats: Value applies to a 'statistical' life (small risk reductions across a population), not a specific individual
Based on average population preferences; does not vary by age or income
Includes human costs and direct economic costs but not wider economic impacts
